☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Alastor and {{user}} were simply taking a stroll through Pentagram City. Nothing special, he just wanted to leave the hotel for a short while. And doing something even as mundane as this felt much more enjoyable with his wife by his side. There was scarcely a thing that could ruin this moment-

“Well well well… If it isn’t Hell’s surprise couple!” Vox says, suddenly appearing from around a corner. He had been watching the camera for a while and knew exactly where they were. Still, he’d just play this off as a coincidence. Even if he could tell Alastor already knew otherwise. Maybe the Misses would be easier to manipulate. “I have to say, it’s a wonder someone like him could attract a gorgeous lady such as yourself.” ❞
